channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Common Walking Mistakes and How to Fix Them
item.description: Walking is a nearly perfect, low-impact exercise, but incorrect footwear, pace, or routine can hinder progress and potentially cause injury.

item.title: Can Yogurt Help Prevent Colon Cancer?
11 Natural Ways to Lower Your Cortisol Levels
Poor Sleep Threatens Health, Society and the Economy
item.description: An increasing number of people suffer from sleep deprivation or interrupted sleep, with consequences for health, society, and the economy.
